externalBlockers.name: latest_sub2api_stream_retry
externalBlockers.reason: The fresh stream retry reached sub2api and Kiro-Go, then upstream Kiro returned HTTP 429 temporary suspicious-activity limits for the selected account. This is external account state, not a tool-schema regression.

externalBlockers.name: forced_askuserquestion_live_retry
externalBlockers.reason: The forced AskUserQuestion request was no longer suppressed by Claude Code client-schema validation and reached upstream Kiro, which returned temporary suspicious-activity 429 limits.

supersededBlockers.name: direct_postfix_tool_loop_retest
supersededBlockers.reason: Fresh retry produced a valid streamed LS tool input and a complete tool_result follow-up turn.

supersededBlockers.name: taskcreate_suppression_root_cause
supersededBlockers.reason: TaskCreate tasks[] is repaired to a single Claude Code TaskCreate input and is no longer suppressed in direct validation.

supersededBlockers.name: askuserquestion_schema_suppression_root_cause
supersededBlockers.oldEvidence: 2026-05-19T05:15:24Z request log with AskUserQuestion questions as JSON string
supersededBlockers.reason: AskUserQuestion questions JSON strings are parsed to arrays before schema validation. Forced live retry now reaches upstream instead of being locally suppressed.

rootCause.symptom: Claude Code sessions could pause/interruption around tool loops after Kiro-Go suppressed recoverable client tool calls.
rootCause.cause: Real Claude Code logs showed a latest AskUserQuestion suppression because questions was emitted as a JSON-encoded string while Claude Code's client tool schema expects questions as an array.
previousCauses: TaskCreate tasks[] shape did not match Claude Code's single-task TaskCreate schema.
TaskUpdate status was emitted as an object instead of the expected string enum.
TaskOutput used task_id/block/timeout alias and string forms incompatible with Claude Code's schema.
For streamed tool_use, content_block_start.input is only a placeholder; final tool input must be reconstructed from input_json_delta.
rootCause.fix: Parse AskUserQuestion/request_user_input questions JSON strings into arrays, wrap single question objects as one-element arrays, then keep normal schema validation. Existing lifecycle repairs and suppression diagnostics remain in place.

researchReferences.claudeCodeGateway: Claude Code LLM gateway is configured through ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL/auth headers and depends on compatible Anthropic Messages semantics.
researchReferences.anthropicToolUse: Official Messages tool-use contract uses assistant tool_use blocks followed by user tool_result blocks; stop_reason can be tool_use and tool input must match input_schema.
researchReferences.anthropicStreaming: Official streaming contract emits tool input through input_json_delta partial_json deltas; the initial content_block_start input can be empty.
researchReferences.anthropicParallelTools: Anthropic tools can be parallel by default; disable_parallel_tool_use is an explicit tool_choice control.
researchReferences.kiroGatewayComparison: jwadow/kiro-gateway keeps explicit Anthropic tool_use/tool_result models and streaming input_json_delta support, reinforcing repair-and-preserve semantics over silent tool-loop loss.
